ab: Ima su ka isu hu?
en: A: Who are you?

ab: Watan Diro ku ka yaku.
Ima su ka isu?
en: A: Who are you?

ab: Laqi ku Sudu Tada ka yaku, Kayku Sudu ka hangan mu.
ch: B:我是Sudu Tada的兒子，我叫Kayku Sudu。
en: B:I am the son of Sudu Tada, my name is Kayku Sudu.

ab: Ima su ka isu?
en: A: Who are you?

ab: Tnsanan ku na Siyac Bawah ka yaku, Dakis Torih ka hangan mu.
ch: B:我是Siyac Bawah的學生，我叫Dakis Torih。
en: B: I am a student of Siyac Bawah, and my name is Dakis Torih.

ab: Ima ka hangan su?
en: A: What’s your name?

ab: Macu Nukan ka hangan mu.
en: B: My name is Macu Nukan.

ab: Ima ka hangan tama su?
en: A: What’s your father’s name?

ab: Yudaw Mona ka hangan tama mu.
en: B: My father’s name is Yudaw Mona.

ab: Ima ka hiya?
en: A: Who is he?

ab: Cili Pukuh ka hiya.
en: B: He’s Cili Pukuh.

ab: Qbsuran mu snaw ka hiya, Abu Nukan ka hangan na.
ch: B:他是我的哥哥，他叫Abu Nukan。
en: B: He’s my brother, his name is Abu Nukan.

ab: Ima hangan na ka hiya?
en: A: What’s his name?

ab: Locing Numin ka hangan na.
en: B: His name is Locing Numin.

ab: Bakun Piyang ka hangan niya hu?
en: A: Is his name Bakun Piyang?

ab: Iyaq, Bakun Piyang ka hangan na.
en: B: Yes, his name is Bakun Piyang.

ab: Batu Suyan ka hangan na hu?
en: A: Is his name Batu Suyan?

ab: Uxay, Temu Ciray ka hangan niya.
en: B:No, his name is Temu Ciray.

ab: Ima ka sediq way?
en: A: Who is that guy?

ab: Sama Watan ka hiya. Swayi qridin bubu mu ka hiya.
ch: B:她是Sama Watan。她是我的阿姨。
en: B: She’s Sama Watan. she’s my aunt.

ab: Ima ka sediq way?
en: A: Who is that guy?

ab: Dangi mu ka hiya, Bakan Watan ka hangan niya.
ch: B:她是我的朋友，她的名字是Bakan Watan。
en: B:She is my friend and her name is Bakan Watan.

ab: Khnu kngkawas su kawas ni ka isu da?
en: A: How old are you?

ab: Maxal kngkawas mu kawas ni ka yaku da.
en: B: I am 10 years old.

ab: Khnu kngkawas kawas ni ka hiya da?
en: A: How old is he?

ab: Maxal dha kngkawas kawas ni ka hiya.
en: B: He is 12 years old.

ab: Piya kngkawas kawas ni ka tama su?
en: A: How old is your father?

ab: Mrimal kngkawas kawas ni ka tama mu.
en: B: My father is 50 years old.

ab: Piya ka tnswayi namu?
en: A: How many brothers and sisters do you have?

ab: Dha ka qbsuran mu mi, taxa ka swayi mu.
ch: B:我有兩個兄姐，一個弟妹。
en: B: I have two brothers and sisters and one younger brother and sister.

ab: Niqan ka qbsuran su snaw hu?
en: A: Do you have a brother?

ab: Uka ka qbsuran mu snaw.
en: B: I don’t have a brother.

ab: Piya knhbrawan hiyi ka tnsapah namu?
en: A: How many people are in your family?

ab: Niqan spac hiyi ka tnsapah nami.
en: B: There are four of us in our family.

ab: Weynu ka sanun su muyas?
en: A: Where did you study?

ab: Isu ku muyas Kareyngko ka yaku.
en: B: I studied in Hualien.
